title: derive-consumer-tenant — input
description: Input to the derive-consumer-tenant Tool — invoked by the write-project-entity Step (Mint phase) of the discover-project Workflow. The single field repo_org_slash_name is the GitHub-shorthand form of source.repo (e.g., 'acme/payments-app'); the Tool's recipe prepends 'tenant-name:' internally per ADR-002.

repo_org_slash_name.description: GitHub-shorthand <org>/<name> form of the consumer's repository, derived from the origin remote URL by the upstream Detect phase. Single forward-slash separator; case-preserving (the recipe is byte-exact on the input string).
